modules.name: cvx.cvx
documentation:
CVX - openCV eXtension
This module provides some constantly used CV tasks using OpenCV/numpy.

by Erik Perillo <erik.perillo@gmail.com>
Copyright 2016 Erik Perillo <erik.perillo@gmail.com>
This file is part of cvx.

along with this. If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.inv
documentation: Inverts image.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.mk_divisable
documentation: Reshapes image so as to be divisible by div.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.pyr_prepare
documentation: Reshapes image so as to be down/up sampled and keep original shape.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.rep_pyrUp
documentation: Performs pyrUp repeated times.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.fill
documentation: Fills image with const value in order to get specified dimensions.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.h_append
documentation:
Appends two images horizontally, filling them with zeros to match 
dimensions if needed.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.v_append
documentation:
Appends two images vertically, filling them with zeros to match 
dimensions if needed.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.append
documentation: Appends two images either horizontally or vertically.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.str_dim
documentation: Returns a string with image dimensions (height x width x depth).

functions.name: cvx.cvx.str_type
documentation: Returns a string with image type.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.str_info
documentation: Returns a string with info for image.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.scale
documentation: Scales pixels of input image to new interval.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.display
documentation: Displays image in viewable format with useful info.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.save
documentation: Saves image in viewable format with useful info.

functions.name: cvx.cvx.resize
documentation: Resizes image to fit dimensions.

classes.name: cvx.cvx.InvalidDimensions
documentation: Exception for unexpected/invalid dimensions.

classes.name: cvx.cvx.InvalidDataType
documentation: Exception for invalid data types.
